roles.player: You can play games and change your password.
roles.teamCaptain: You can manage your team members, change your team name, change your password, and rate games.
roles.gameAdmin: You can monitor game progress, manage teams, handle notifications, and view analytics.
roles.contentAdmin: You can create and manage events, games, and puzzles during the setup phase.
roles.systemAdmin: You can configure system settings including AI, rate limits, and system parameters.
roles.admin: You have full system access including all admin functions and system configuration.

chat.readonlyAdminContact: Admin messages are one-way. Click on your team name to send messages.
chat.readonlyAdminNotifications: Admin notifications are one-way. Click on your team name to send messages.

profile.title: Profile
profile.userDataNotAvailable: User data not available. Please try logging in again.
profile.invalidUserData: Invalid user data. Please try logging in again.
profile.languageDescription: Select your preferred language. This setting is saved and persists across sessions.
profile.languageInfo: Your language preference is saved automatically and will remain active even after logout.

password.title: Change Password
password.errorNewTooShort: New password must be at least 8 characters
password.errorNewSameAsCurrent: New password must be different from current password
password.errorSessionExpired: Session expired. Please log in again.
password.errorRateLimited: Too many attempts. Please try again later.

team.title: Team Name
team.hintName: Choose a unique team name (3-50 characters)
team.errorTooShort: Team name must be at least 3 characters
team.errorTooLong: Team name must not exceed 50 characters
team.errorUpdate: Failed to update team name. Please try again.

rating.title: Game Rating & Feedback
rating.noCompletedGames: No completed games yet. Complete a game to rate it!
rating.placeholderComments: Share your feedback about this game...

systemAdmin.title: System Admin Dashboard
systemAdmin.errorLoadConfig: Failed to load configuration. Please check your permissions.
systemAdmin.errorPermissionDenied: You do not have permission to access this section.
systemAdmin.confirmReloadCache: 🔄 Reload configuration cache? This will clear all cached values.
systemAdmin.confirmModalWarning: This change will take effect immediately for all users. Are you sure?
systemAdmin.themeDescription: Transform the interface with curated visual experiences
systemAdmin.themeNote: Theme changes apply globally and persist across sessions

gamePackage.title: Game Event
gamePackage.emptyState: No game packages found. Create your first package to get started!

storyTab.placeholderTitle: e.g., Faust - The Quest for Knowledge 2024
storyTab.hintImage: Max size: 2MB. Stored in database with event.
storyTab.placeholderStoryHtml: Full HTML story text displayed on main game screen
storyTab.tipImagePlaceholderCode: to insert the uploaded image anywhere in your story.
storyTab.labelShowPoints: Show Points (display scores and leaderboards to users)
storyTab.hintShowPoints: When disabled, points are still calculated but hidden from users. Useful for relaxed team-building events.
storyTab.labelShowDependencies: Show Dependencies (display prerequisite info to users)
storyTab.hintShowDependencies: When enabled, shows which games must be completed first (e.g., "Depends on Game X"). When disabled, dependency info is hidden but games remain LOCKED until prerequisites are completed.

categoriesTab.emptyState: No categories found. Click "Create New Category" to add one.
categoriesTab.confirmDelete:
Delete category "{name}"?

This will fail if any games use this category.

promptsTab.emptyState: No system prompts found. Create prompts to control AI behavior!
promptsTab.deleteModalWarning: This will permanently delete this system prompt. This action cannot be undone!
